jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at BD India
jsonLd.description:
BD India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BD India:
BD India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India!
